mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( ISBN, review_title, review_content, view_cnt, secret, status, temporary, created_at, user_id, category ) VALUES ( #{req.isbn}, #{req.reviewTitle}, #{req.reviewContent}, 0, #{req.secret}, TRUE, #{req.temporary}, NOW(), #{userId}, #{req.category} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET review_title = #{req.reviewTitle}, review_content = #{req.reviewContent}, secret = #{req.secret}, temporary = #{req.temporary}, created_at = CASE WHEN temporary = TRUE AND #{req.temporary} = FALSE THEN NOW() ELSE created_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id AND l.user_id = #{userId} )) AS liked FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId} AND r.status = TRUE AND (r.secret = FALSE OR r.user_id = #{userId})

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content AS content, c.user_id AS userId, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.parent_id AS parentId FROM review_comments c JOIN reviews r ON c.review_id = r.review_id WHERE c.review_id = #{reviewId} AND r.status = TRUE ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category FROM reviews r WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.temporary = FALSE AND ( r.secret = FALSE OR (#{userId} IS NOT NULL AND r.user_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id) AS likeCount, (EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.review_id = r.review_id AND l.user_id = #{userId} )) AS liked FROM reviews r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = TRUE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category FROM reviews r WHERE r.status = TRUE AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category FROM reviews r WHERE r.review_id = #{id} AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.temporary = TRUE AND r.status = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, review_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.ISBN AS isbn, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.secret AS secret, r.status AS status, r.temporary AS temporary, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.user_id AS userId, r.category AS category FROM reviews r INNER JOIN likes l ON r.review_id = l.review_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = TRUE AND (r.secret = FALSE OR r.user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = TRUE AND temporary = FALSE
